quests.title: Find a hidden café
quests.description: Discover a café you've never entered before and order something new.

quests.title: Walk a new street
quests.description: Take a street you always pass but never turn down. See where it leads.

quests.title: Touch grass
quests.description: Find some grass and touch it with your bare hands. Feel the earth.

quests.title: 5 minutes under the sky
quests.description: Sit somewhere with no roof above you for 5 full minutes. No phone.

quests.title: Find three plants
quests.description: Identify three different types of plants within 200 metres of you.

quests.title: Good morning stranger
quests.description: Say good morning to someone you don't know. Make eye contact.

quests.title: Ask for a recommendation
quests.description: Ask a local shopkeeper for their favorite thing in the neighborhood.

quests.title: Give a genuine compliment
quests.description: Give someone a specific, genuine compliment about something they've chosen or done.

quests.title: Take the scenic route
quests.description: Take a completely different route home than you normally would.

quests.title: Eat somewhere new
quests.description: Have lunch somewhere you've never been before. Order the special.

quests.title: Order the unpronounceable
quests.description: Order something from a menu that you can't pronounce. Trust the process.

quests.title: Find beautiful light
quests.description: Find something beautiful you'd normally walk past and photograph it.

quests.title: Doorway stories
quests.description: Photograph a doorway that tells a story. What lives behind it?

quests.title: Spot something funny
quests.description: Find something funny or ironic in your environment and capture it.

quests.title: Read the plaques
quests.description: Find a historical plaque or building marker and read the full story.

quests.title: Window shopping detective
quests.description: Look in shop windows and imagine the lives of people who would buy these things.

quests.title: Bird watching
quests.description: Sit still for 10 minutes and count how many different birds you can spot.

quests.title: Cloud shapes
quests.description: Lie on your back and find 3 shapes in the clouds. Name them.

quests.title: Wave at a neighbor
quests.description: Make eye contact and wave at someone who lives in your neighborhood.

quests.title: Thank a service worker
quests.description: Give a genuine thank you to someone doing essential work (cashier, cleaner, etc).

quests.title: Climb something
quests.description: Climb a hill, stairs, or small structure you've never climbed before.

quests.title: Get deliberately lost
quests.description: Walk for 15 minutes without checking your phone. Find your way back.

quests.title: Street art safari
quests.description: Find and photograph 3 pieces of street art or graffiti in your area.

quests.title: Texture collection
quests.description: Find and photograph 5 different textures (rough, smooth, patterned, etc).

quests.title: Public space performance
quests.description: Do something silly in public for 30 seconds (skip, dance, sing).

quests.title: Talk to an elder
quests.description: Have a 5-minute conversation with someone significantly older than you.

quests.title: Plant investigation
quests.description: Find one plant and learn its name. Take a photo and look it up.

quests.title: Water meditation
quests.description: Find moving water (fountain, stream, rain) and watch it for 5 minutes.

quests.title: Architecture hunt
quests.description: Find a building with unique architectural features and photograph them.

quests.title: Local business discovery
quests.description: Visit a local business you've never noticed and learn what they do.
